summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new ASR Enterprises Solar CRM features. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All requested features verified working - OTP login, notifications, AI auto-assign button, WhatsApp quote integration.
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are implemented correctly and working as expected
Email OTP uses fallback 131993 since RESEND_API_KEY is not configured (documented MOCKED API)
Notifications are stored in-memory (not MongoDB) as documented - will reset on server restart
seed_data_creation: Test leads and followups created during testing. Test data prefixed with TEST_ for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) WhatsApp Quote Integration (POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/send-quote-whatsapp returns wa.me URL), 2) AI Auto-Assign (POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/auto-assign uses location + round-robin), 3) Bulk Auto-Assign All button visible on CRM Leads tab, 4) Staff OTP login with fallback 131993, 5) Notifications bell in Staff Portal with dropdown showing follow-up reminders.

whatsapp_quote_integration.details: Returns whatsapp_url in format https://wa.me/{phone}?text={encoded_quote_message}. Quote includes system size, costs, subsidy, EMI info.

ai_auto_assign_lead.details: Assigns unassigned leads using: 1) Location match (checks staff districts), 2) Round-robin (staff with least leads). Returns assigned_to, assigned_name, assignment_reason, whatsapp_notification_url.

bulk_auto_assign_all.ui_button: AI Auto-Assign All button visible on CRM Dashboard Leads tab (data-testid='auto-assign-all-btn')
bulk_auto_assign_all.details: Processes all unassigned leads. Returns total_processed, successful count, and results array.

staff_notifications.ui_element: Bell icon (data-testid='notifications-bell') in Staff Portal header with unread count badge
staff_notifications.details: Returns notifications array with unread_count. Mark read: PUT /api/staff/{staff_id}/notifications/{id}/read

staff_otp_login.ui_element: Email OTP tab on Staff Login page (data-testid='send-otp-btn', 'verify-otp-btn')
staff_otp_login.details: Send OTP returns email_sent status. Verify with fallback OTP 131993 when RESEND_API_KEY not configured.

admin_otp_login.details: Admin email: asrenterprisespatna@gmail.com. Returns email_sent status. Fallback OTP 131993.

followup_reminders.details: Creating followup sends notification to staff. Today's followups include staff_whatsapp_url and customer_whatsapp_url.

mocked_apis.email_otp: OTP 131993 is hardcoded fallback when RESEND_API_KEY not configured (returns email_sent: false)
mocked_apis.notifications: Stored in-memory (notifications_storage dict), not persisted to MongoDB

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/crm/followups/today - Today's followups with WhatsApp URLs

crm_dashboard_leads_tab.send_quote_whatsapp_button: Present in Actions column for each lead

staff_portal.notifications_dropdown: Opens on click, shows notifications with 'Mark all read'
